_about: Two lookup tables for location normalization. SYSTEMS is the closed enum of 22 canonical Bobiverse star systems. GAZETTEER maps named in-world places to their parent system. Confidence reflects source strength: 'timeline' = stated in the fan timeline, 'cast' = from book-2 Cast appendix, 'unresolved' = needs wiki/prose lookup. Do NOT trust 'unresolved' rows without verification.

systems._note: Only local-bubble stars carry real XYZ in stars-near.bin. Federation Capital is fictional (no real star). Sagittarius A* is the galactic center (~26000 ly) - off-scale, render as directional beacon, NOT an in-scene node.

conflicts.desc: Timeline B1C39 says Bender leaves for 'Gamma Leporis A'. Wiki 22-system list has 'Eta Leporis'. One is wrong. MATTERS: Bender is the search target of book 4.
Book-2 Cast says Milo found Vulcan/Romulus at 'Epsilon2 Eridani'. Datelines + timeline say Omicron2 Eridani (=40 Eri). Cast is wrong.
conflicts.action: trust dateline; Omicron2 Eridani is canonical

conflicts.desc: Genealogy JSON spells 'Viktor', born 2165. Timeline B2C24 says 'Victor' cloned 2174, alongside a 'Pete' absent from the JSON.
conflicts.action: normalize to 'Victor'; add Pete; reconcile date

conflicts.desc: Genealogy 'born' year vs timeline 'comes online' year disagree for first cohort (2144 vs 2145).

conflicts.desc: Fan genealogy JSON covers ~through book 2. Book 3 active Bobs (Marcus, Herschel, Neil, Icarus, Daedalus, Mack) missing.
